global.title: Volkswagen put 100 sheep to work under 31,000 solar panels
global.summary: Volkswagen has traded lawnmowers for sheep at the massive solar farm that helps power one of its factories in Poland, and the animals are doing more than just keeping the grass short.

global.title: Kia’s electric hatch gains AWD and nearly 350 miles of range
global.summary: Kia launched the new all-wheel drive (AWD) EV4 variant in Europe, but it’s not quite the range-topping GT model.

global.title: What I saw inside Lectron’s EV charger factory in China
global.summary: Whether you know the Lectron name or not, there’s a good chance you’ve used one of its EV charging adapters. The company makes many of the J1772/CCS-to-NACS and NACS-to-J1772/CCS adapters that EV drivers rely on. Now, Lectron has launched the NEXUS, its second-gen Level 2 home EV charger. I recently

global.title: Sunrun wants to pay you to turn your home into an AI data center
global.summary: Sunrun wants to turn thousands of solar-powered homes into a giant distributed AI data center – and pay homeowners to help power the AI boom.

global.title: Ford admits its $30K midsize EV pickup is actually ‘small’
global.summary: Ford’s midsize EV pickup, due out next year, will be smaller than expected. For the first time, Ford referred to it as an “all-new, affordable small electric pickup” built on the UEV platform.

global.title: China is bringing buttons back to cars, ending trend led by Tesla
global.summary: China will require automakers to include physical buttons for safety-related functions, pushing back on the proliferation of using screens for everything in modern cars.

global.title: Lectric XP4 750 e-bike gets FREE $498 flash sale cargo bundle, Navee Summer EV Sale, EGO Select Cut + Touch Drive mower $599, more
global.summary: At the front of our midweek Green Deals pack is a cargo-focused flash sale on Lectric’s XP4 750 Folding Utility e-bike with a $498 FREE bundle at $1,299. Coming up behind it is Navee’s Summer Sale lineup of EV deals, like the UT5 Max Electric SuperScooter at its $1,300 low, as well as EGO’s advanced

global.title: Xiaomi makes Sky Nomad official: new EREV brand to take on Li Auto
global.summary: Xiaomi officially confirmed “Sky Nomad,” the name of its new extended-range electric vehicle (EREV) effort, after months of rumors. The first model is a full-size SUV expected to deliver over 1,500 km (932 miles) of combined range. The announcement puts China’s hottest EV newcomer on a collision cou

global.title: This $22K EV coupe has a semi-solid-state battery and a ‘Queen’ makeup station in China
global.summary: The MG 07 is the electric coupe we want, but can’t have. It’s about to go on sale in China with a semi-solid-state EV battery offering nearly 400 miles (610 km) of range, the industry’s first “Queen” makeup station, and a bunch of other premium extras for about $22,000.

global.title: BYD’s first pickup goes on sale for $63,000 in the UK, with more EV range than the Ford Ranger
global.summary: BYD launched the Shark, its first pickup in the UK and across Europe, priced from about $63,000, with 56 miles of pure-electric range. Powered by its Super Hybrid plug-in powertrain, BYD claims the Shark “brings performance far in advance of what can be achieved by traditional diesel pickups.”
